title: wedelia rubra
intro: Wedelia rubra, also known as the red florist's or firewheel plant, is a flowering plant species native to Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Wedelia rubra include reducing fever, treating respiratory problems, and providing relief from digestive issues, among others. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties for therapeutic purposes.
